testsuite.name: StudentManagement

testcase.name: testFailedLogin

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. JSON path data.email doesn't match. Expected: wrongemail@example.com Actual: null

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. JSON path data.email doesn't match. Expected: wrongemail@example.com Actual: null

testcase.name: getByIdStudent

failure.message:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: The content to match the given JSON schema. error: object has missing required properties (["data","pagination"]) level: "error" schema: {"loadingURI":"#","pointer":"/properties/data"} instance: {"pointer":"/data"} domain: "validation" keyword: "required" required: ["data","pagination"] missing: ["data","pagination"]
Actual: {"success":true,"data":{"id":"27ea2773-ee2c-496d-b925-e0697e44e7a2","nama":"annisa ferdeani","nis":"112233","kelas":"X-IPA-2","jurusan":"IPA","email":"annisa123@amail.com","telepon":"0812345678","alamat":"indonesia konoha","created_by":"unknown","created_at":"2026-07-04T04:53:16.123259+00:00","updated_at":"2026-07-04T04:53:16.123259+00:00"}}

testsuite.system-out:
